title: Apple Inc. $AAPL Stock Holdings Reduced by Adams Diversified Equity Fund Inc.
sentences: Apple Inc. $AAPL Stock Holdings Reduced by Adams Diversified Equity Fund Inc.
Adams Diversified Equity Fund Inc. reduced its stake in Apple Inc. by 1.0% in the third quarter, selling 8,100 shares.
Despite this reduction, Apple remains the fund's third-largest holding, comprising 7.1% of its portfolio.
The article also details other institutional investor activities, analyst ratings, financial data, and recent news impacting Apple's stock.
